name: libfile-slurp-perl
title: libfile-slurp-perl
summary: single call read & write file routines
description:
single call read & write file routines
File::Slurp provides some quickie routines that read from,
append to or overwrite a file - with a single subroutine call. Their main
intention is to save a couple of lines of code over and over again,
but they do not do anything fancy.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libfile-slurp-perl because single call read & write file routines.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libfile-slurp-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libfile-slurp-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libfile-slurp-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
